test.name: Adding products to cart

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath:(//a[@class='button product_type_simple add_to_cart_button ajax_add_to_cart'][normalize-space()='Add to basket'])[1]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath:(//a[@class='button product_type_simple add_to_cart_button ajax_add_to_cart'][normalize-space()='Add to basket'])[1]'.
kw.arg: xpath:(//a[@class='button product_type_simple add_to_cart_button ajax_add_to_cart'][normalize-space()='Add to basket'])[1]

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element View Basket is not clickable at point (367, 599). Other element would receive the click: (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.110); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: Symbols not available. Dumping unresolved backtrace: 0x7ff751514435 0x7ff751514490 0x7ff7512ad49d 0x7ff751310845 0x7ff75130df5a 0x7ff75130ade5 0x7ff751309c97 0x7ff7512fb1c6 0x7ff7513317ca 0x7ff7512faa46 0x7ff751355728 0x7ff7512f8e38 0x7ff7512f9d23 0x7ff7517e3b30 0x7ff7517de3b8 0x7ff7517fe72a 0x7ff7515307e5 0x7ff75153978c 0x7ff75151d794 0x7ff75151d946 0x7ff751503457 0x7ffe83227374 0x7ffe843dcc91
kw.status: ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element View Basket is not clickable at point (367, 599). Other element would receive the click: (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.110); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: [ Message content over the limit has been removed. ] 0x7ff751310845 0x7ff75130df5a 0x7ff75130ade5 0x7ff751309c97 0x7ff7512fb1c6 0x7ff7513317ca 0x7ff7512faa46 0x7ff751355728 0x7ff7512f8e38 0x7ff7512f9d23 0x7ff7517e3b30 0x7ff7517de3b8 0x7ff7517fe72a 0x7ff7515307e5 0x7ff75153978c 0x7ff75151d794 0x7ff75151d946 0x7ff751503457 0x7ffe83227374 0x7ffe843dcc91

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.status: ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element View Basket is not clickable at point (367, 599).
